paper_section: §4.1 EML compiler ('K denotes the size of the RPN code')
paper_quote: K denotes the size of the RPN code (number of EML/leaf nodes in the binary tree).
informal_pl: Definiujemy size termu EML jako liczbę węzłów: liść .one ma rozmiar 1, węzeł .eml t u ma rozmiar 1 + size t + size u. Odpowiada to długości RPN-kodu z paperu (kolumna 'EML compiler K').
informal_en: We define the size of an EML term as the number of nodes: .one has size 1, and .eml t u has size 1 + size t + size u. This matches the K column ('EML compiler K') in the paper's catalogue.
lean_target_signature:
def EMLTerm.size : EMLTerm → ℕ
  | .one => 1
  | .eml t u => 1 + EMLTerm.size t + EMLTerm.size u
notes: Structural recursion on EMLTerm. | Pure definition: result = target.
